modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Grubhub app not syncing after new coyote card activation.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing issues with the Grubhub app on their cell phone. After receiving a new coyote card due to a broken one, the app fails to sync properly. They are seeking assistance to resolve this syncing problem.
short_description: Grubhub app not syncing after new coyote card activation.
description: The user is experiencing issues with the Grubhub app on their cell phone. After receiving a new coyote card due to a broken one, the app fails to sync properly. They are seeking assistance to resolve this syncing problem.
